summary: Make export --json, workflow archive --json, and events property-drift pass the live dogfood gate (json fidelity + error-path).
reason: Full live dogfood (447-cmd matrix) found 3 pre-existing failures: export --json emitted empty stdout on an empty store (not valid JSON); workflow archive --json leaked syncResource's NDJSON progress to stdout, breaking single-document fidelity; events property-drift returned exit 0 for an unknown event where the gate expects a non-zero error.
validated_outcome: Re-ran dogfood --live --level full: 446/446 PASS (property-drift error_path now correctly skipped via annotation).
upstream_issue: GENERATOR BUG: channel_workflow.go is generator-emitted (DO NOT EDIT) and syncResource (sync.go) writes NDJSON to os.Stdout unconditionally under !humanFriendly; the generated workflow archive --json inherits it. Fix belongs in the generator template, not this CLI. File a retro.
